1.speaker: Crab
1.text: This is a time I recall quite well.

3.speaker: Crab
3.text: It was the beginning of something...

5.speaker: You
5.text: Well, to me, this looks like the Renaissance.

7.1.speaker: Crab
7.1.text: I see. Humans love to put titles on things. Even things without form

8.speaker: Crab
8.text: Take a look around, tell me what you see.

9.speaker: Crab
9.text: I'm curious to know what could be so special about this place.
